title: Ministry of Energy and Climate Solutions Revises Co-Processing Methodology under BC LCFS
content: BC LCFS releases document provides guidance on how to determine the renewable fraction of co-processed fuel and outlines acceptable methods for determining the inputs required to model the renewable fuelâ€™s CI. This document applies only to coprocessing that occurs in a refinery. It also focuses specifically on methodologies and requirements for coprocessed fuels. It does not provide general guidance on CI application procedures or modelling and should be used in conjunction with the guidance provided in RLCF-008: Carbon Intensity Applications and the applicable â€“ pathway specific â€“ GHGenius user guides available on the Renewable and low carbon fuel resources page.
author: Analysts Account
